metadata.description: Vladimir Suponin's Claude Code marketplace — curated skill forks, authored skills, and safety hooks

plugins.name: pocock-skills
plugins.description: Curated subset of mattpocock/skills with local-markdown adaptations: grill-me, tdd, to-prd, to-slices, diagnose, zoom-out, improve-codebase-architecture

plugins.name: safety-hooks
plugins.description: Block dangerous git commands and access to secret files. Per-project whitelist via .claude/safety-hooks.local.md.

plugins.name: python-quality-hooks
plugins.description: PostToolUse hooks for Python: ruff bugs-only check + mypy on Edit; ruff isort-fix + format + same checks on Write. Non-blocking.
